description_long: This cabinetry set features an L-shaped configuration with both upper and lower cabinets, designed for a kitchen or utility space. The upper cabinets are finished in a light color with paneled doors and sleek bar pulls, while the lower cabinets are darker, providing a strong visual contrast. The countertop is black and appears to be made of a solid, polished material, with integrated appliances such as a stovetop and oven. The cabinetry includes multiple drawers and doors, offering ample storage and organization options. The handles are modern and metallic, complementing the overall contemporary style. The set is intended to be installed against two intersecting walls, maximizing corner space and functionality.
description: L-shaped kitchen cabinetry with contrasting light upper and dark lower cabinets, black countertop, and integrated appliances. Features modern bar pulls and multiple storage compartments.
description_view_0: Front view showing both upper and lower cabinets, black countertop, and visible handles and appliances.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the plain backs of the cabinets and the depth of the upper and lower units.
description_view_2: Side view focusing on the solid sides of the cabinetry and the continuous countertop surface.
description_view_3: Angled view displaying the corner configuration, oven, stovetop, and the arrangement of drawers and doors.
attribute_cabinet_type: corner base and wall cabinet set
